title: Rich Tender Kenyan Chicken Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Kenyan-inspired chicken curry made with Thai green curry paste, perfect for meal prep. This sugar-free-friendly dish is pressure-cooked to tender perfection.
instructions: Heat the coconut oil in the pressure cooker over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the Thai green curry paste and cook, stirring constantly, for 1-2 minutes.
Add the chicken pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, chicken broth, salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Close the lid of the pressure cooker and set the valve to 'sealing'.
Pressure-cook at high pressure for 10 minutes, followed by a 10-minute natural release.
Open the lid and check that the chicken is tender. If not, close the lid and pressure-cook for an additional 5 minutes.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
